title: Nothing Phone (3) gets another price cut at Amazon — here's why this underrated phone is worth it
summary: Combined with this record-low price, the Phone (3) makes a compelling alternative to more conventional flagship devices like the Galaxy S26 or Google Pixel 10. Still, for most people, the Phone (3) is still an excellent camera phone.
